offer: For law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient tracking causes missed deadlines. We centralize agreements instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient tracking of contract renewals leading to missed deadlines
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Join community forums for law firms' tools
try_it: Let users try centralized document storage and renewal reminders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing contracts
